title: Distribution systems for beneficials – Application Trichogramma dropper
subtitle: Systèmes de distribution pour les auxiliaires - Application Trichogramma dropper
description: A practice abstract presenting the use of a GPS-enabled drone fitted with a Trichogramma dropper for precise and cost-effective biological control of the European corn borer in maize. It details the capsule-based release of around 1000 Trichogramma eggs per capsule over large and irregular fields using both automated and manual drone operations.
